message:
refactor(plan,lab): formatting cleanup and clippy adjustments

Plan analysis (analysis.rs):
- Add #[allow(clippy::should_implement_trait)] to DeadlineMicros::add()
  since it intentionally doesn't implement std::ops::Add
- Formatting adjustments for multi-line method chains
- Consistent spacing in match arm comments

Lab explorer (explorer.rs):
- Minor formatting adjustments

Topology benchmark (tests/topology_benchmark.rs):
- Minor adjustment
